verdicts.note: Renewing an existing dedicated EMS levy maintains current service. The dossier does not establish program expansion or an audit-versus-invest dispute sufficient for a spending-axis lean.

review_notes: Display text accurately preserves the official levy and bond terms, calculated household examples, attributed pro arguments, and the absence of submitted con statements. The EMS renewal's taxes strength 1 appropriately distinguishes continuation from a new levy; the fire-station bond's taxes strength 2 reflects new long-term debt repayment. No local-control mapping is supported by either dossier.
